name: MediaEngine
displayName: MediaEngine – AI Image, Video & Audio Generation (MCP)
description: Generate images, videos, and audio using AI — Nano Banana, GPT Image 2.0, Seedance and Hailuo video, text-to-image, text-to-video, and text-to-speech — directly from Claude, Cursor, or any MCP-compatible agent. Supports text-to-image generation, style prompting, branded output, editorial hero images, email banners, social media graphics, teaser videos, article narrations, and podcast audio. Intent-specific tools let Claude automatically pick the right format, aspect ratio, and style — no prompt engineering needed. Async job processing with polling and status tracking.

tools.name: generate_article_hero_image
tools.description: Generate a hero banner image for a blog post, article, or editorial page. Creates an AI-generated visual from the title and summary — ideal for CMS hero banners, newsletter headers, and article thumbnails. Supports brand style hints and reference images.

tools.name: generate_email_header_image
tools.description: Create an AI-generated header image for marketing emails and newsletters. Optimized for wide-format email banners from subject line and body text. Accepts tone and brand style hints for on-brand visuals.

tools.name: generate_social_teaser_image
tools.description: Create a social media teaser image optimized for LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, or Substack. Auto-selects the best aspect ratio and generates a visual from article or post content.

tools.name: generate_article_teaser_video
tools.description: Create a short AI-generated teaser video (15–30s) from an article summary or social post. Produces a shareable video for driving traffic from video-first platforms like YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram Reels.

tools.name: generate_article_narration
tools.description: Generate audio narration of article or blog post content using text-to-speech. Creates podcast-style audio, accessibility voiceovers, and audio newsletters. Supports multiple voices and playback speeds.

tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Generate an image from a text prompt — AI image generation via the MediaEngine model catalog (nano-banana, gpt-image-2, and more). Use this for any image creation request: illustrations, photos, art, logos, icons, graphics, or visuals. Accepts prompt, size, model, and style overrides.

tools.name: generate_audio
tools.description: Generate audio from text using text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis. Create voiceovers, narrations, podcast audio, or any spoken audio from text input. Supports multiple voices, formats (MP3, FLAC, AAC, Opus), and playback speeds.

tools.name: generate_video
tools.description: Generate a video from parameters using AI video generation. Use this for any video creation request when the intent-specific video tools don't fit. Accepts provider-specific generation parameters directly.

tools.name: wait_for_job
tools.description: Wait for a media generation job to complete. Polls the job until it finishes or times out — use this to get the final image, video, or audio result without manually checking status in a loop.

tools.name: get_job_status
tools.description: Check the status of an image, video, or audio generation job. Returns the current state (queued, processing, done, failed) and the result URL when complete.

tools.name: list_jobs
tools.description: List all media generation jobs — images, videos, and audio — with filtering by status, type, and date. Supports sorting and cursor-based pagination.

MEDIAENGINE_API_KEY.description: Your MediaEngine API key (me_live_... or me_test_...)

MEDIAENGINE_BASE_URL.description: Override the API base URL. Defaults to https://api.mcpmediaengine.com

useCases: Generate hero images, featured images, and thumbnails for blog posts and articles
Create header images and banners for marketing emails and newsletters
Produce social media images for LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, and Substack
Create short teaser videos for article promotion and social sharing
Generate audio narrations, podcast episodes, and voiceovers from text
Generate images from text prompts — illustrations, photos, AI art, graphics
Convert text to speech for accessibility, audio newsletters, and podcasts
Automate media production in content pipelines and publishing workflows
searchQueries: MCP tool for article hero images
